title: ocimum americanum var. pilosum
intro: Ocimum americanum var. pilosum, also known as American Sweet Basil, is a variant of the American Basil plant, native to North America and characterized by its hairy or pilose leaves. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ocimum americanum var. pilosum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Ocimum americanum var. pilosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
